title: The Road Poneglyph and the Next Routes
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on the road poneglyph and the next routes within the The Road Poneglyph and the Next Routes storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You were bound; are your hands and feet okay?

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: We're sorry for keeping you locked up, Raizo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Reconci- Liation of our two rulers,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: And our safe reunion with the Kozuki family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hold it right there, Luffy! You've had enough banquets, no?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Are you okay with just leaving Sanji's situation up in the air?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm coming with you! I can't help but feel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A bit re- sponsible for what happened.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Plus, are you telling me you can sail this ocean without a Navigator?!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm coming too! Pekoms is gravely injured! We need a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Of course, when everyone gets depressed, we'll need some- one to play music!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: How rude! Stop excluding your own crew members!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: I also saw Sanji taken away before my very own eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Kinemon, I'll be taking these guys. Is that okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: As if anyone could stop a man off to save his friends!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: In fact, if circumstances were not the way they are, I'd have liked to gone with you! I am indebted to Sanji, after all. My apologies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That whole "quiet inflation" plan's looking a bit unlikely now... if things go south, you all better double-time it outta there!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: If you happen to come across a poneglyph, could you make me a copy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if this is the same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He's not off to the bookstore, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: I'll take a look at the poneglyph that Kaidou's got in Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: These quakes... I've never felt any- thing like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Zunsha in trouble! At that very moment, Luffy hears...?!

summary: The Road Poneglyph and the Next Routes: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
